news.title:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.
news.summary:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.

news.title:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.
news.summary:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.

news.title:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.
news.summary:

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
